programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: After a faulty interview with the Life Foundation ruins his career, former reporter Eddie Brock's life is in pieces. Six months later, he comes across the Life Foundation again, and he comes into contact with an alien symbiote and becomes Venom, a parasitic antihero.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: John Wick is a former hitman grieving the loss of his true love. When his home is broken into, robbed, and his dog killed, he is forced to return to action to exact revenge.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: John Wick is forced out of retirement by a former associate looking to seize control of a shadowy international assassins’ guild. Bound by a blood oath to aid him, Wick travels to Rome and does battle against some of the world’s most dangerous killers.

programme.title: Tombstone
programme.desc: After success cleaning up Dodge City, Wyatt Earp moves to Tombstone, Arizona, and wishes to get rich in obscurity. He meets his brothers there, as well as his old friend Doc Holliday. A band of outlaws that call themselves The Cowboys are causing problems in the region with various acts of random violence, and inevitably come into confrontation with Holliday and the Earps, which leads to a shoot-out at the O.K. Corral.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: When Dr. Indiana Jones – the tweed-suited professor who just happens to be a celebrated archaeologist – is hired by the government to locate the legendary Ark of the Covenant, he finds himself up against the entire Nazi regime.

programme.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: An apocalyptic story set in the furthest reaches of our planet, in a stark desert landscape where humanity is broken, and most everyone is crazed fighting for the necessities of life. Within this world exist two rebels on the run who just might be able to restore order.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. After some grisly events at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge.

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop thought he had put his murderous past behind him when his most formidable foe kidnaps the love of his life. Now he is forced to travel the globe to complete three impossible assassinations, and do what he does best, make them look like accidents.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: An art collector appeals to Indiana Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure of heart.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love, and freedom.

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: John Constantine has literally been to Hell and back. When he teams up with a policewoman to solve the mysterious suicide of her twin sister, their investigation takes them through the world of demons and angels that exists beneath the landscape of contemporary Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: After Frank Castle's whole family is gunned down in cold blood, he shall become the vengeful Angel of Death known as the Great Equaliser of Crime: The Punisher. The one-man hurricane of blood and bullets is about to make the thugs who destroyed his life rue the day they made The Punisher come to life.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: An elite team of soldiers has been used against terrorists where they use astounding physical capabilities to overcome them. Victoria, a reporter, follows them and discovers a part of their secret. When one of the team kills her cameraman she tries to escape. Luc, one of the soldiers begins to have flashbacks and turns sides and helps her as the remainder of the team follows to protect their secrets.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. After some grisly events at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Detective Sherlock Holmes and his stalwart partner Watson engage in a battle of wits and brawn with a nemesis whose plot is a threat to all of England.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2½: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lieutenant Frank Drebin discovers that his ex-girlfriend's new beau is involved in a plot to kidnap a scientist who advocates solar energy.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball player must spend $30 million in 30 days in order to inherit $300 million. However, he's not allowed to own any assets, destroy the money, gift it, give it to charity, or tell anyone about the deal.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: A man is murdered. Two men witness it. A blind man who hears the killer, and a deaf man who sees them. The police don't think they're credible witnesses, but the killers don't want to take any chances. The two men must now work together to save themselves and bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Private Parts
programme.desc: Having always wanted to be a disc-jockey, Howard Stern works his way painfully from radio at his 1970's college to a Detroit station. It is with a move to Washington that he hits on an outrageous off-the-wall style that catches audience attention. Despite his on-air blue talk, at home he is a loving husband. He needs all the support he can get when he joins NBC in New York and comes up against a very different vision of radio.

programme.title: Police Academy 4: Citizens on Patrol
programme.desc: A new batch of recruits arrives at Police Academy, this time a group of civilian volunteers who have joined Commandant Lassard's new Citizens on Patrol program. Although the community relations project has strong governmental support, a disgusted Captain Harris is determined to see it fail.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A snobbish Wall Street commodities broker and a wily street hustler find their positions reversed as part of a bet by two callous millionaire brothers who run a brokerage house.

programme.title: My Cousin Vinny
programme.desc: Two carefree pals traveling through rural Alabama on their way back to college are mistakenly arrested and charged with murder. Fortunately, one of them has a cousin who's a lawyer - Vincent Gambini, a former auto mechanic from Brooklyn who has just passed his bar exam after his sixth try. When he arrives with his leather-clad girlfriend to try his first case, it's a real shock - for him and the Deep South!

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: A married workaholic, Michael Newman doesn't have time for his wife and children, not if he's to impress his ungrateful boss and earn a well-deserved promotion. So when he meets Morty, a loopy sales clerk, he gets the answer to his prayers: a magical remote that allows him to bypass life's little distractions with increasingly hysterical results.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head Do the Universe
programme.desc: After a "creative" judge sentences them to space camp, a black hole sends our adolescent heroes 24 years into the modern future where the duo misuse iPhones, embark on a quest to score, and become targets of the Deep State.

programme.title: Prince of Space
programme.desc: A Group of space men from the planet Krankor who resemble chickens are led by their leader, Phantom to invade Earth. But a strange superhero named Prince of Space (actually a bootblack in disguise) arrives to defeat the spacemen. Although the weapons of the aliens cannot harm the Prince of Space, the Phantom continues to fight, and many plot twists (including capturing a group of elderly scientists) ensue. Watch out for the Giant!

programme.title: Police Academy: Mission to Moscow
programme.desc: The Russians seek help in dealing with the Mafia from the veterans of the Police Academy. They head off to Moscow, in order to find evidence against Konstantin Konali, who marketed a computer game that everyone in the world is playing.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: The mayor declares that anyone can enroll in the police academy irrespective of their physical condition or education level, and many misfits descend on the academy, including a young troublemaker who's forced to apply or go to jail.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Six Police Academy graduates are assigned to the 16th precinct, and their Captain desperately wants them to clean up the crime ridden neighborhood, but his second in command schemes to become captain himself by sabotaging the rookies.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: In this enchantingly cracked fairy tale, the beautiful Princess Buttercup and the dashing Westley must overcome staggering odds to find happiness amid six-fingered swordsmen, murderous princes, Sicilians and rodents of unusual size. But even death can't stop these true lovebirds from triumphing.

programme.title: Hot Shots!
programme.desc: Topper Harley, a top gun fighter pilot, is recalled to serve on the SS Essess. Topper's mission is to destroy Saddam Hussein's nuclear plants. Unfortunately, Topper is psychologically imbalanced and is sure to crack under pressure.

programme.title: House of Wax
programme.desc: A sculptor opens a wax museum to showcase the likenesses of famous historical figures, but quickly runs into trouble when his business partner demands the exhibits become more extreme in order to increase profits.

programme.title: I Bury the Living
programme.desc: Through a series of macabre "coincidences," the newly-elected director of a cemetery (Richard Boone) begins to believe that he can cause the deaths of living owners of burial plots by merely changing the push-pin color from white (living) to black (dead) on a large wall map of the cemetery that notes those plots.

programme.title: Invaders from Mars
programme.desc: A young boy learns that space aliens are taking over the minds of earthlings.

programme.title: Invisible Agent
programme.desc: The Invisible Man's grandson uses his secret formula to spy on Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Island of Terror
programme.desc: A small, isolated island community's terrorised from a horde of creeping, blobbish, tentacled monsters which liquefy and digest the bones from living creatures. The community struggles to fight back, against these horrors.

programme.title: Lady Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein's daughter and his assistant/her lover continue his experiments in an attempt to rebuild his legacy after he is killed by his psychotic, murderous first monster.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A ragtag group of Pennsylvanians barricade themselves in an old farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls that are ravaging the Northeast of the United States.

programme.title: Renfield
programme.desc: Renfield, Dracula's tortured henchman, is forced to capture prey for his master and do his every bidding. But now, after centuries of servitude, Renfield is ready to see if there is a life outside his boss's shadow.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Returning to the ancestral castle long after the death of the monster, the son of Dr. Frankenstein meets a mad shepherd who is hiding the comatose creature. To clear the family name, he revives the creature and tries to rehabilitate him.

programme.title: Soylent Green
programme.desc: A nightmarish futuristic fantasy about the controlling power of big corporations and an innocent cop who stumbles on the truth.

programme.title: Terror Train
programme.desc: A college fraternity prank goes wrong and a student ends up in the mental asylum. Three years later, it's graduation time, and the members of the fraternity decide to have a costume party aboard a train trip to celebrate their graduation. Unknowingly to them, a killer has slipped aboard, killing them off one by one, disguised in the costumes of the victims.

programme.title: The Dead Don't Die
programme.desc: The focus is on the sleepy small town of Centerville where the dead become undead.

programme.title: The Ghost of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Ygor resurrects Frankenstein's monster and brings him to the original doctor's son Ludwig for help. Ludwig, obsessed with the idea of restoring the monster to full power, is unaware that his various associates all have different ideas about whose brain should be transplanted into the monster's skull.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: A scientist finds a way of becoming invisible, but in doing so, he becomes murderously insane.

programme.title: The Invisible Man Returns
programme.desc: The owner of a coal mining operation, falsely imprisoned for fratricide, takes a drug to make him invisible, despite its side effect: gradual madness.

programme.title: The Invisible Man's Revenge
programme.desc: An eager scientist tests his new formula for invisibility on an escaped fugitive. When the formula works the criminal runs off to terrorize a family he believes cheated him out of a fortune years earlier.

programme.title: The Invisible Ray
programme.desc: Dr. Janos Rukh discovers a certain type of radium that has almost magical healing properties. But the element has a dangerous side, too, and it has already started affecting Rukh. Consumed by paranoia, he begins to suspect that his wife is having an affair. Wild for revenge, Rukh hatches a deadly plot...using his own poisoned body as a weapon to kill.

programme.title: The Invisible Woman
programme.desc: Eccentric Professor Gibbs, brilliant but impractical, invents an invisibility machine and advertises for a guinea pig. What he gets is Kitty Carroll, an attractive, adventurous model, who thinks being invisible would help her settle a few scores. Complications arise when three comic gangsters steal the machine to use on their boss. But they fail to reckon with the Revenge of the Invisible Woman!

programme.title: Oingo Boingo Live At The Ritz (1985)
John Lennon and the plastic ono band Toronto 1969
Van Halen - Live Without a Net (1986)
Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers - Rockpalast (1977)
Jethro Tull - Jack In The Green
Columbo
programme.desc: A popular country western singer wants to get rid of his religiously zealous wife who's been using blackmail to control every aspect of his life. But a murder made to look like an airplane accident does not fool the wily Lt. Columbo.

programme.title: Maude
programme.sub-title: Walter's Problem (1) (a.k.a.) Life of the Party (1)
programme.desc: After a wild evening of drinking, Maude, Walter and Arthur awake to discover some oddities. First, Maude and Arthur shared a bed, second the guys trashed the living room and third, Walter made an obscene phone call to Maude's mother. Carol suggests that perhaps Walter has a drinking problem but he refuses to face that fact. Maude and Walter later get into a big argument while they are both drunk and Walter slaps her.

programme.title: Maude
programme.sub-title: Walter's Problem (2) (a.k.a.) Life of the Party (2)
programme.desc: After giving Maude a black eye, Walter continues to drink. Later, Arthur sends over a recovering alcoholic to talk some sense into Walter who adamantly refuses help. When Walter discovers Maude got rid of all the alcohol, he goes ballistic and she locks him in the closet. That's when Carol makes an announcement, she's taking Phillip and is moving out

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors who are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: In this pilot for another series (Empty Nest, obviously the concept was retooled), the girls' friend Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: The Golden Palace
programme.desc: Nick De Carlo, a handsome patron says he cannot pay the bill and wants to work in the kitchen. The girls want to find something more appropriate for him to do and ask him about his trade. Nick says he is a gigolo. Shocked, the girls hire him anyway to wash the dishes.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: After Fred gets a minor injury from a car accident, Lamont and Fred seek to find a maid to help out around the house. After looking, they get what the agency has at the bottom of the barrel. However, the erratic white woman does nothing but add to Fred's pain.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Both Gloria and Mike help Edith and Archie express their sexual interaction after catching Edith reading How to be your Husband's Mistress.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Stranded in a subway train with different personalities, Mike is shocked when he punches a man for the very first time in his life after the man had pushed Gloria aside.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Bunkers and Teresa wake up with their bathroom on fire! Archie expects money cashing in from the insurance company, until he finds out he's guilty for starting the fire.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.sub-title: Wendy & Janine vs. Rich & Bruce vs. Regina & Shawn
programme.desc:
Sweep of Champions, Day 2
Janine & Wendy is the same year in September 24, 1991.
Rich & Bruce is the same year in September 26, 1991. Shawn & Regina is the same year in October 24, 1991.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.sub-title: Dora & Jean vs. Roxanne & Barry vs. Don & Mary
programme.desc:
Sweep of Champions, Day 3
Jean & Dora is the same year in October 28, 1991.
Barry is the same version from Monopoly in June 30, 1990.
Barry & Roxanne is the same year in July 5, 1991.
Mary & Don is the same year in October 8, 1991.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The stooges are policemen on the trail of a murderer. They unsuccessfully interrogate an Italian organ grinder, among other suspects, and then catch the bad guy after a gun fight that nearly destroys the police station.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: Larry is a pet dealer who's seeing Moe's wife while at the same time trying to steal Shemp's fiancée. When Moe's become suspicious, Larry attempts to frame Shemp as the boyfriend. He gets Shemp a job as a door to door pajama salesman and sends him to Moe's apartment, and then tells both Moe and Shemp's fiancée to go there and catch him in the act. Larry's plan backfires when Shemp catches him and lets Moe deliver some punishment.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Violent is the Word for Curly
programme.desc: The stooges work as gas station service men who end up running away from three professors on an ice cream truck. After thawing Curly out from sitting in the back of the ice cream truck the boys put on the professors clothes from their stolen luggage. The stooges are mistaken to be the professors by the college who is expecting them and they poorly pose as the professors and sing their famous ""Alphabet Song"". The real professors show up, but the ladies in the ""girls-only"" college end up getting their athletic program thanks to the stooges.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The stooges are janitors working in a newspaper office. When an anonymous caller phones in a tip about the theft a famous diamond, the boys decide to become reporters and go after the crooks.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The stooges reminisce about their wartime romances in Europe. After they finish their tales, they discover that Joe's girl Fifi, whom he left behind in Paris, has moved in next door. The only problem is that she's now married, with a very jealous husband. The husband turns out to be a real cad, and when Fifi overhears him tell about his plans to find a new wife, she clobbers him and goes back to Joe.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: After initially joining the Union army, Moe and Larry switch allegiances to their Southern home state and Confederate brother Curly.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The stooges are discharged from the army and go to see their fiancées, but find they have been dispossessed and the wedding is off until they find a home. The boys have trouble finding a vacant apartment so they set up housekeeping in a vacant lot. Their housing problems seem to be solved until a farmer destroys their new home with a tractor. The stooges then build a house of their own, but the girls aren't impressed with the one room mansion and walk out on them.

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: A beautiful woman is sent back in time via hypnosis to the Middle Ages where she finds she is suspected of being a witch, and subject to being executed.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne is mad at Dan for forgetting Valentine's Day, so he winds up full-figure lingerie shopping; and Darlene's upset when a boy she likes asks out Becky instead.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne is torn between taking care of her flu-stricken husband and helping Jackie learn lines for her play.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne may lose her job if she and Dan go on their long-awaited trip to see Wayne Newton perform in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Becky's boyfriend Mark is certainly not popular around the Conner house when Dan learns he and Becky tampered with his vintage motorcycle, Dan hits the roof, blaming Becky, while Roseanne heads to Mark's house to try and make him break up with her daughter.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: The new wife next door, Kathy Bowman, looks down on Roseanne and complains that D.J. is a bad influence on her son Todd.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne helps Crystal with her Lamaze classes; Dan's near-fatal accident at work makes D.J. follow him obsessively; Dan and Roseanne sit up all night doing their wills, and Jackie is offended that she doesn't get custody of the kids.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to convince Darlene to wear something feminine to a big school dance -- but she'd rather attract attention for her softball skills.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: The family barbecue sees Nana Mary's first appearance on the show. Family and friends (except Dan's father and Roseanne's mother) gather at the Conner household for food, drink and singing, and Roseanne's fellow waitress Bonnie, gets a chance to show what a great singer she really is. Beverley still manages to upset Roseanne and Jackie from the other end of the phone, but Nana Mary turns the tables on her.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: The staff find they have to start paying more for lunch and Mrs. Slocombe tries to make some side money by selling her home-made perfume.

programme.title: Toon in With Me
programme.sub-title: 2nd Annual Not So Special Christmas Special
programme.desc:
It's Bill and Toony's second annual "Not So Special Christmas Special," featuring cartoons starring Sylvester. Tweety, Tom & Jerry, and Bugs Bunny.
Featured cartoons: Hare Force (1944) The A-Tom-inable Snowman (1966) A Gander at Mother Goose (1940) Alpine Antics (1936) Snow Business (1953)

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police commissioner provides a false alibi for a neighbor who killed his wife in a fit of rage. He then kills his own wife in cold blood and blackmails the neighbor into faking an alibi for himself. Lt. Columbo has to untangle this mess.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: After Caroline has an incredible make-out session with Max's pastry school teacher, Chef Nicholas (recurring guest star GILLES MARINI), Caroline finds out something that makes her wish it never happened.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max finds herself wanting to be more than just friends with her pastry school partner, Deke. Meanwhile, Caroline is "hot for teacher" - the married Chef Nicholas.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Deke takes Max to his place after a great first date, his "home" is nothing like she expected. Meanwhile, Caroline feels empowered - then scared for her life - after having a shady car towed from the front of their apartment building.

programme.title: WWF Prime Time Wrestling
programme.desc: On this edition of Prime Time Wrestling, Gorilla Monsoon and Bobby "The Brain" Heenan host an extraordinary lineup of in-ring competition, including Bad News Brown going one-on-one with Brutus "The Barber" Beefcake in a main event confrontation. Plus, The Ultimate Warrior in action, another look at The American Dream Dusty Rhodes, and more.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Louise expects to get a charge out of taking down her Thomas Edison-obsessed science teacher when she re-creates one of the famous inventor's experiments that involved electrocuting an elephant.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The competition for attention between Ray and Robert reaches an all-time high with the brothers ending up in a fight. Ray's dreams of authoring a sports book get squashed when the publishing company takes a pass on it. To make matters worse, Robert receives the good news that he is being promoted to lieutenant.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is mortified when he meets a girl whom he dated 25 years earlier and believes he treated with disrespect. Meeting Elizabeth again, Ray, wracked with guilt because he feels he didn't behave properly on their high school date, is determined to apologize. However, when he finds out the real reason Elizabeth went out with him that night long ago, he regrets ever bringing up the past.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie about having to work late so he can play mud football and get out of going to her seminar. Now sick from his night of football in the rain, Doug starts watching TV and begins to drift off to sleep... Doug, finally full of guilt, goes to tell Carrie the truth of what happened and she doesn't react exactly the way he thought she would.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug feels sorry for Arthur and agrees to let him go to a cocktail lounge instead of to the weekly dance at a senior center. When Carrie finds out, she goes ballistic and turns her father's care over to Doug-a job he soon regrets taking on.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine see opportunities for themselves when George causes a couple to separate; Kramer can't remove his new jeans.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: It's finally time for George and Susan's wedding. George doesn't think he can go through with the wedding. But when Susan puts George in charge of the wedding invitations, George gets the cheapest ones in the lot, knowing that the glue for the envelopes is cheap.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day, Jackie finally spills the news of her new job to her mother; and Dan's dad butters up Crystal.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Darlene refuses to read her prize-winning poem on Culture Night at her school, preferring to stay home to watch a ballgame with Dan, until Roseanne lays down the law.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: In the season finale, Dunder-Mifflin holds a Casino Night in the warehouse to benefit charity. While Michael faces the task of juggling two dates, Jim is forced to ponder the reality of transferring to the Stamford branch and what that means for his relationship with Pam.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Michael apologizes to Oscar, after he finds out he's gay, for calling him a homosexual slur--but his apology outs Oscar to the entire office. And Jim decides to take a promotion at the Stamford office.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Poppa's Got a Brand New Badge
programme.desc: Homer starts a security company with Lenny and Carl after the police are ineffective during a blackout, and eventually Mayor Quimby decides to have them replace the police. Homer finds that he excels at the job, but then he runs afoul of mob boss Fat Tony, who threatens Homer with death unless he leaves town.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer clones himself with a magic hammock; Zombie cowboys come back from the dead after Springfield bans guns; The Simpsons family take a vacation on an island where Dr. Hibbert can turn people into animals.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How I Spent My Strummer Vacation
programme.desc: Homer spends a week at a Rock'n'Roll Fantasy Camp run by big name recording artists and where he feels at home. When the week is over the stars invite him to perform at a benefit gig but,annoyed to find that he is only expected to act as a roadie,he hogs the microphone and performs his own song,causing havoc in the process and being chased off-stage. Back home,however,he finds his own,appreciative audience.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Bart vs. Lisa vs. the Third Grade
programme.desc: The Simpsons buy a satellite television, which Bart spends so much time watching that he does not study for an important achievement test. He scores so low that Principal Skinner demotes him to third grade, while Lisa does so well that she is moved up to third grade. The two are placed in the same class and become rivals. During a trip to Capital City, they get separated from their class and are forced to help each other in order to find their classmates.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge thinks Homer is flirting with two women and begins to worry that Homer isn't as attracted to her. Manjula advises plastic surgery, and Marge goes under the knife for some liposuction, but the doctor accidentally gives her breast implants instead.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Kelly reveals a bit too much about her family when she auditions for a part in a sitcom, and the producers base the new sitcom on the Bundy household.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: After the funeral of a former football teammate at the Bullpen Sports Bar, an old rival, named Jack Franklin, challenges Al and his former team from Polk High into a grudge football match between them. But Al ends up being turned into a tackling dummy by ringers Bubba Smith, Laurence Taylor, Ken Stabler and John Reynolds on the opposing team.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: When the national baseball league go on a strike, NO MA'AM organizes their own league sponsored by nudie bars.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Al launches his group NO MA'AM in a protest outside the local TV station after Marcy's group FANG gets NO MA'AM's favorite TV show "Psycho Dad" canceled. But in a blizzard, no one takes notice. Meanwhile, Kelly and Bud try to convince Al to have them throw a house party for their friends.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Al and his friends from NO MA'AM who include Griff, Officer Dan, Ike, and Bob Rooney travel to Washington D.C. where thanks to Jefferson's pull, being a former CIA agent, Al and the group gets to address the U.S. Senate about Psycho Dad being put back on the air.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.sub-title: The Naked and the Dead, But Mostly the Naked
programme.desc: Peggy and her friends join the men at a visit to the nudie bar to find out why the men spend so much time there. Meanwhile, Kelly gets a part in a weight loss commercial.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Kelly must learn how to fire a bow in order to get a part in a commercial.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Al's Dodge mysteriously disappears during a family visit to a local car wash while on their way to Wanker county. Meanwhile, Marcy's ex-husband, Steve Rhoades, mysteriously reappears at the car wash to show her his new life while she is trying to get the lazy Jefferson to work there.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont tries to have a quiet evening with his latest girlfriend, Darlene, but has little privacy thanks to an annoying Fred who keeps interrupting them. Fed up, Lamont decides to move into his own apartment, which at first worries Fred but then discovers he himself has privacy.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred does not feel like paying his bills and he throws them in the trash claiming that they never arrived, dragging out the services for as long as he can. After doing so, Fred receives threats that say that they will turn off the gas, electricity, and other utilities, and repossess his furniture if he does not pay.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont purchases two coffins from an auction to try and get a profit if he sells them to a funeral parlor. In the process, Fred becomes paranoid by having the coffins in the house and refuses to sleep in the house with the coffins. Lamont doesn't think much of it, until he begins hearing strange noises at night.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred proposes marriage to Donna Harris, a widow whom Fred is in love with. Lamont can't understand why a practical nurse in her 40's would be interested in a 65-year old junk dealer, and does his best to oppose their impending nuptials.

programme.title: Get a Life
programme.desc: Chris wins a weekend with his favorite talk show host, a contest the host first regrets he agreed to, but later Chris regrets he entered, when the host decides to stay.

programme.title: Get a Life
programme.desc: After destroying her kitchen, Chris becomes Sharon's slave to work off the $2000 in damage and she also breaks his will.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Charlie Dog tries to take up home in Porky Pig's house and Porky goes through great lengths to get rid of him. Directed by: Charles M. Jones / An infamous criminal by the name of Bluebeard is loose! Directed by: Arthur Davis

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Porky and his dog go duck hunting.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: As soon as Bugs finds out that the bounty on a rabbit is only two cents, he goes out and tries to make rabbits the most dangerous animals ever.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny is drumming up business for a Vaudeville show in a remote western town.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Pa and Junyer try to get some honey from a bee hive.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Giovanni Jones, a very well known and fantastic opera singer, is constantly interrupted by Bugs' folk music while he is trying to rehearse for a big performance.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Sylvester Cat starts to saw down Tweety Bird's house. Tweety flees into a badminton court, where he becomes the birdie in the game. Sylvester disguises himself as a player, and Tweety drops a TNT stick into Sylvester's mouth.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Wile E. Coyote makes disastrous attempts to catch the Road Runner.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head want to go to a concert so they try to kidnap Stewart for ransom money...but quickly get sick of him.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The boys sit in on a speech therapy class and improve their vocabulary.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Recall a time when life was simpler as Beavis, Butt-head and other Highland residents fill in for the Cleaver family.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: When the boys decide to throw a party so they can 'cop a feel,' it is almost ruined when Stewart and his friends show up, but then Todd arrives and trashes the house.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis encounters a secret admirer at school.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: When Principal McVicker gets fed up with Beavis and Butt-head's constant stupidity and uncontrollable laughter on every word that looks dirty to them for the final time, he puts them on a No Laughing prohibition. If caught laughing once more in class, they risk expulsion.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head mistakenly think they have switched bodies.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The boys meet a tattooed, escaped serial killer who hears voices just like Beavis does.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The boys hang out with a drunken Todd and learn all his secrets on being cool.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc:
A manners expert visits the class, and after attempting to teach Beavis & Butt-head manners, loses it and gets in a fight with Mr. Van Driessen. videos:
Green Day - "Longview"
Prong - "Snap Your Fingers, Snap Your Neck"
Styx - "Too Much Time On My Hands"

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Butt-Head makes Beavis look old so he can buy beer. Beavis ends up in a senior living facility and almost scores with an 80-year-old woman.

programme.title: Pee-wee's Playhouse
programme.desc: Pee-wee and Miss Yvonne are playing office and taking turns as boss and secretary. But when it's time for Miss Yvonne to be the boss, Pee-wee takes his break. Later on, Cowboy Curtis stops by with a new friend: a cactus who decides "that" it's fun to stick around.

programme.title: Pee-wee's Playhouse
programme.desc: Pee-wee reminisces on the good times with his friend, Cowboy Curtis, including Curtis showed him his fantastic rope tricks and when Pee-wee and the Countess gave Curtis some tips on dating. Secret Word: REMEMBER

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.sub-title: And The Icing On The Cake
programme.desc: When Deke invites Max’s friends over for a gathering at his dumpster, Caroline learns an enormous secret about his background.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Phil Leotardo seeks to continue a cycle of retaliation between the New York and Jersey families. Christopher wrestles with his addictions. Tony decides keeping Carmela occupied with the spec house is for the best. A.J. gets a new girlfriend.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Bobby and Janice host a wild 47th birthday bash for Tony at their Adirondacks vacation home. Tony's actions following Johnny Sack's arrest come back to haunt him.

programme.title: The Good Place
programme.desc: Arriving at a new place, Michael receives an unexpected honor. Meanwhile, the rest of the group explores — and learns a shocking truth.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra continues her seemingly futile search for a suitable match, Daemon returns Westeros to Kings Landing and stirs more trouble for the King. Rhaenyra learns a valuable lesson about desires and what it means to be a daughter of a King.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The Hound is judged by the gods. Jaime is judged by men. Jon proves himself. Robb is betrayed. Tyrion learns the cost of weddings.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Four Houses consider make-or-break alliances. Jon and the Wildlings face a daunting climb.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Chase begins surgery on a physically deformed teenager but has to stop the operation when the teen has issues on the table. House and his team plus a new candidate diagnose the teen. The teen has a news crew following his story, so they follow House and his team around. The cameras bring out some confessions and other behaviors in the staff.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: House treats a magician but comes to believe he's faking illness to cover up his own incompetence. Meanwhile, House pits the fellows against each other in his version of an immunity challenge.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When the Simpsons run out of food thanks to a bag boy strike (caused by Homer), the family finds an old box of animal crackers with a sweepstakes that sends The Simpsons to Africa.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's rush to the hospital to reattach his thumb, Lisa's rush to school to win the science fair, and Bart's run-in with an illegal fireworks scheme are interconnected in a parody of Go and Run Lola Run.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After finding a sketchbook belonging to his late wife Maude, Ned Flanders opens a Bible-themed amusement park to honor her memory.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After spraining his knee during a basketball game, Homer begins taking care of the neighborhood kids to cure his boredom, prompting jealousy from Bart and Lisa, who feel that Homer is giving the kids the attention they never had.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer refuses to pay a five dollar airport tax to fly to Delaware, the family is forced to ride in a livestock car of a train instead. There they meet a singing hobo who tells three tall tales: Homer as Paul Bunyan. Lisa as Connie Appleseed, a parody of Johnny Appleseed. Bart as Tom Sawyer with Nelson as Huckleberry Finn.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc:
In the twelfth Treehouse of Horror episode:
Hex and the City – While on a day trip through Ethnictown, Homer's bumbling catches the ire of a gypsy, who curses Homer's family and friends into receiving nothing but bad luck.
House of Whacks – in this mixed parody of Demon Seed and 2001: A Space Odyssey, Marge buys an automated house and customizes it with the Pierce Brosnan personality, who falls for Marge and attempts to murder Homer.
Wiz Kids – In this Harry Potter parody, Bart and Lisa go to a school for wizards, and Lord Montemort (Mr. Burns) uses Bart to capture Lisa's magic.
Guest star: Pierce Brosnan and Matthew Perry.[20]

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart gets in trouble for joyriding in a police car, but feels confident he will be let off by Judge Snyder. However, Snyder goes on vacation before ruling his verdict and is replaced with a coldhearted judge named Constance Harm. She accuses Homer of being a negligent father and sentences him to be tethered to Bart. The two are against it at first but later start to bond. Marge however is unable to take anymore of it and slices the tether off of them both. Homer and Marge then go after Judge Harm only to end up sinking her houseboat. Eventually Bart decides to take punishment and is about to be sentenced to 5 year in juvenile hall, only though Judge Snyder returns and dismisses Harm.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe becomes depressed and decides to return to bartending school so he can re-evaluate himself. He meets an old teacher, who suggests that Moe try improving his bar, which might make him happier. Moe takes the advice, and turns his bar into a trendy nightclub, which does not sit well with his regular customers Homer, Lenny, Carl, and Barney.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: A Hunka Hunka Burns in Love
programme.desc: Homer becomes a fortune cookie writer for a Chinatown restaurant. Mr. Burns reads one of Homer's fortunes, which says that the reader will find love before Flag Day is over. Burns goes searching for love and meets Gloria, a meter maid, and asks her out. Gloria reluctantly agrees, and Burns recruits Homer to help him look young and hip to his new girlfriend.

programme.title: WWE Raw
programme.desc: No one is safe as Mr. McMahon goes on a rampage to show everyone that he is still the boss. With every superstar at the mercy of his wrath, the Chairman turns to the Big Boss Man to teach some old friends a lesson in loyalty. The Rock learns that his actions could earn him some capital punishment. Also in action, DX, Val Venis, and many more.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and Roland find themselves in a compromising situation. Alexis drives a wedge between David and Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David’s photographer ex-boyfriend arrives in town to do a photo series on Moira. Johnny and Roland suspect that Bob is cheating at poker.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: As Max pet-sits Randy’s dog, Bruno, and Caroline sets up meetings with actresses who are interested in playing her in the potential biopic, Bruno escapes while a cannibalistic serial killer is loose in their neighborhood.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: The girls’ Hollywood adventure continues as Caroline signs away the rights to her life story so it can be turned a movie. Also, Max is heartbroken when Randy breaks up with her via his therapist, Elliot, and Caroline rents a party bus in an attempt to cheer her up.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.sub-title: And The Show and Don’t Tell
programme.desc: When the girls go to prison to see Caroline’s father, Martin, perform in a musical, they tell him their plan to use Caroline’s movie money to convert their cupcake window into a dessert bar.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When the girls decide to look for a larger space for their dessert bar, Han sets them up with Evie, a real estate agent who has a crush on him. Also, Max is on the fence when Randy surprises her at the diner hoping to patch up their relationship, so she tells Caroline to decide for her.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.sub-title: And The Attack of the Killer Apartment
programme.desc: In an attempt to get to know Max’s world better, her boyfriend Randy asks to spend a night at her apartment. Also, Caroline works on getting a liquor license for their dessert bar.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.sub-title: And The Partnership Hits The Fan
programme.desc: When a law firm courting Randy for a job invites Randy and Max to dinner at a hip new restaurant, the evening veers off course when their eclectic cuisine doesn’t sit well with Max.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Max and Caroline need more space for their renovated dessert bar, they’re willing to do just about anything to convince Angie, the brash owner of the pizza place next door, to rent them her back office.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Max and Caroline discover that Han is in hot water after amassing substantial debt that he cannot repay from gambling on women’s tennis, the diner gang rallies to help him.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.sub-title: And the Two Openings: Part One & Part Two
programme.desc: As Max and Caroline, now part owners of the diner, put the finishing touches on their newly converted Dessert Bar, Max deals with the aftermath of her recent breakup with Randy, and Sophie and Oleg prepare for the birth of their baby.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max and Caroline’s plans to attract a more sophisticated clientele to their dessert bar take a turn when Max befriends a bouncer whose team of arm wrestlers becomes their latest patrons. Also, Max and Randy continue to text each other, but when she runs out of sexy messages to send him, Oleg offers to be her ghost writer.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Oleg and Sophie’s plan to have Max and Caroline as Barbara’s godparents is derailed when Oleg’s domineering mother, Olga, arrives from the Ukraine for the baby’s baptism and fires Max and Caroline from their godparent duties.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Caroline and Max are invited to speak about their business at Caroline’s alma mater, the University of Pennsylvania, Max takes the opportunity to give Caroline the college partying experience she never had. Also, Oleg’s attempts to bond with baby Barbara are rebuffed by a possessive Sophie, and Han practices his magic tricks with a reluctant Earl as his assistant.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Earl becomes concerned he may not be able to keep up when his long lost sweetheart, Pilar, visits from Cuba, and wants him to take her sightseeing around the country. Also, Max must decide whether it’s time to take her texting relationship with Randy to the next level.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When the girls take a bartending class in order to add cocktails to their dessert bar menu, Caroline must think quickly when she has to take the class exam solo after Max gets chicken pox from Han. Also, Sophie creates a creepy lookalike video monitor doll to keep tabs on baby Barbara.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max and Caroline's dessert bar business booms when they hire Clint, a popular bartender, but the girls need to intervene when Han becomes addicted to the mixologist's potent cocoa powder in his signature cacao drink. Also, Han enters a duck stamp-drawing contest, and glamour eludes Sophie as she adjusts to being a mom.

programme.title: Ted Lasso
programme.desc: With his wife and son visiting from America, Ted makes drastic changes to the lineup during a critical match.

programme.title: Ted Lasso
programme.desc: When Jamie refuses to train, Ted turns to talented new signing Dani Rojas—and the team is struck by an age-old curse.

programme.title: Ted Lasso
programme.desc: Rebecca celebrates her first anniversary as a divorcée as the team plays a match in Liverpool.

programme.title: Mr. Wizard's World
programme.sub-title: Flour, Pendulum, Leaf Color, How a Siren Works, Blow out Candle, Guitar, Aurora, Crush can and more
programme.desc: n this episode, Mr. Wizard shows Flour Explosion, Pendulum, Hidden Leaf Color, How Sirens Work, Mapping a Guitar, Blown Out Candle, Card Illusion, Aurora Borealis, Come Back Can and Crush Gallon Can.

programme.title: Mr. Wizard's World
programme.sub-title: Speed of Sound, Refraction, Trick, Light Bulb Filament, Glass Duet, Spell Check, Stars and more
programme.desc: Speed of Sound, Selective Refraction Trick, How Many Stars, Glass Duet, Spelling Checker, After a Forest Fire, Window Oscillation, Asparagus, Finding a Tree's Height. Mr. Wizard measures the difference between hearing the sound of a starter pistol over the walkie-talkie and hearing it through the air.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: Beakman explains how blood provides food and oxygen to the human body and removes the blood cells' waste products while defending your body from disease. He also covers questions on the speed of the fastest dog and the longest word, an experiment with salt and dreams and your imagination.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: In this episode, Beakman shows how plants "eat," reveals a host of creepy animal facts and shows how to make and recycle paper.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: Beakman reveals how soap cleans and how explosions propel automobiles, and explores the question if birds sweat?

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: Beakman reveals the truth on electrical currents, if carrots improve eyesight and explores the workings of the electric light.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: Beakman tells us about sound and how explosions are made.

programme.title: Bill Nye: The Science Guy
programme.desc: Wetlands are not just home to different animals and plants, but they also control flooding and help keep the Earth’s water clean. Flood waters move more slowly through wetlands because they have to go through barriers of plants and dirt. Wetlands help stop erosion because the plants stop the soil from washing away. Plants and soil in wetlands slow water enough that bacteria and other decomposer organisms can break down and even absorb some types of pollution. Wetlands are wet. Let’s keep them that way.

programme.title: Bill Nye: The Science Guy
programme.desc: Scientists believe that birds evolved from reptiles. Birds have backbones, and they lay eggs, but they’ve developed a unique feature that sets them apart from all other animals – feathers. Feathers are made of the same stuff human fingernails and hair are made from – a protein called keratin. Feathers, combined with lightweight bones, powerful wings and strong hearts let birds fly.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: In this, the first half-hour episode, a four-year-old Gumball becomes too much for young parents, Nicole and Richard, to handle, so they buy him a goldfish, but after the first six die from neglect, stupidity, and unfortunate incidents, Richard finds a special one in a shady red van who bonds with Gumball on a spiritual level. This gets put to the test when Darwin gets flushed down the toilet and must traverse a scary, new world to return home.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: In this, the first half-hour episode, a four-year-old Gumball becomes too much for young parents, Nicole and Richard, to handle, so they buy him a goldfish, but after the first six die from neglect, stupidity, and unfortunate incidents, Richard finds a special one in a shady red van who bonds with Gumball on a spiritual level. This gets put to the test when Darwin gets flushed down the toilet and must traverse a scary, new world to return home.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: After seeing Alan and Carmen bond during her lunchtime bullying, Jamie decides that she needs a sweetheart... and has her eyes on Darwin.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Mr. Small feels that he hasn't inspired the children of Elmore Junior High, so Gumball and Darwin try to lift his spirits... and end up causing chaos and putting most of the students (and faculty) in the school infirmary (and others in the hospital) after following Mr. Small's useless advice.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball develops a strange stutter, and it makes him accidentally offend Darwin.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin read Anais' diary and discover her relationship with a new friend is one-sided.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball is walking in the same direction as Hot Dog Guy, and with each step it becomes increasingly awkward.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: A neighbor disappears and the Wattersons investigate, but discover the culprit may be their Evil Turtle.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: In order for Tobias to let them use his points in a video game, Gumball and Darwin must do his chores for him.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy are in perfect sync, except when it comes to their taste in food. What’s the best food ever created, burgers or burritos? The two friends have an all-out competition to settle things once and for all.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Cyborg’s Love Matcher 5000 program pairs Raven with Beast Boy and Starfire with Aquaman. While Beast Boy does everything he can to get Raven to love him, Robin tries to be more like Aquaman to win Starfire’s heart.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: A magical prism causes Raven to fragment into five distinct personalities which wreak havoc around town until the other Titans can figure out how to rejoin her.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: When the gang bands together to form a giant robot, Robin is relegated to the left leg, but he makes the left leg count!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The Titans discover the wonders of reading, but after opening a book that brings their thoughts to life, they must fight against their own imaginations!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy love lazy Sundays sitting on the couch … even when it’s a Tuesday! But when Robin replaces the couch with a treadmill, the two lazy teens must embrace the new active lifestyle.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: When Robin needs an archenemy, Starfire generously offers to fill the role and she exceeds expectations.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: When Robin starts doing power moves with Cyborg, Beast Boy gets very jealous.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy have a staring contest that lasts 30 years, bringing them face to face with a future of adulthood and responsibility… and they hate it.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Feeling the other Titans depend too much on their super powers, Robin challenges them to go 24 hours without using their powers. To his distress, they all succeed, leading him to question his own value to the team.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: When Ren falls ill, it's Nurse Stimpy to the rescue, swearing by the Sacred Bedpan to cure his friend. Will the constant care lead to a cured Chihuahua, or a total relapse?

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: During a 36-year mission to the Crab Nebula, Commander Höek succumbs to Space Madness and puts Cadet Stimpy in charge of the mysterious History Eraser Button!

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy need new jobs, so they disguise themselves as Dalmatians, go to work for a psychotic fire chief, and battle a 40-story building fire, saving Mr. Horse and others!

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: In this space adventure, Commander Höek and Cadet Stimpy land on an eerie planet with only their Space Cadet Handbook to guide them! Can they avoid certain doom? Nope.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: Nature show host "Marlon" Höek and his sidekick Stimpy explore a strange Galapagos Island chain where all species look like Ren and Stimpy... but even less evolved!

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The boys go to door-to-door to collect money for the poor as part of a class project; they meet up with a dominatrix.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen sends the boys on a petition drive to stop a furrier from coming to town.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head buy helium balloons in order to kill dolphins at a dolphin show.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Daria is assigned to help the boys with their science project.

programme.title: Double Dare
programme.sub-title: Two Musketeers (Rick & Leah) vs. Thermonuclear Hostess Ding Dongs (William & Sherri)

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
The Love Boat Goes on a Cruise Missile Cruise will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
Alasdair forms an anti-war group (W.I.M.P.), while Ross argues that war is a necessary evil.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Wizard will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
Alasdair tries to discover the formula for the green slime.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
Family Ties Get Untied will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
During their divorce proceedings, the producer's wife takes half the show away - literally half of everything - with strange results.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
The Partridge Family Get Shot will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
Ross' nephew visits the show, but doesn't get along very well with the cast.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
The A-Team Makes One Cup of Coffee Last 5 Hours will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
The kids hang out - at the arcade, the library, malls and summer camp, after school, at the Burgery, around the set, outside prison, stores, locker and dressing rooms. They also hang laundry, hang tough, and generally just hang in there.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
Mr. Wizard Shows You How to Make Rain will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
Alasdair makes a weather machine, but it doesn't work correctly.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
Knight Rider Wants a Ferrari will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
The cast is jealous of Christine after she gets a raise.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
Dunking for Dollars will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
The series is sold to various foreign countries. Adam acts as millionaire Ronald Rump.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
Love Connection Short Circuits will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
Doug pretends to be Cupid and tries to fix up the entire cast with a girl/boyfriend.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc:
Mr. T Thinks He's a Girl will not be seen at this time so that we may present...
Alasdair tries out different jobs to see which one is right for him. Lisa does a paper for school on what people want to do for their careers.

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc: It's constipation and conservation as those with food disorders take on the environmental industry. It's the classic battle of diet pills versus dying seals. Games - Survivor - Seamen Island, Log Drop, Ball Busters & Brass Balls.

programme.title: MXC
programme.sub-title: Hot Chicks of Primetime vs. Hot Celebrity Moms
programme.desc: It's beautiful babes and baby buggies, as the ladies of primetime TV take on hot celebrity moms. It's the classic battle of collagen lips vs. spreading hips. Games - Pinheads, Sinkers & Floaters, Irritable Bowl Syndrome & Brass Balls.

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc: Workers at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, Washington, DC 20001 take on the rest of the world on this week's episode of MXC.

programme.title: MXC
programme.sub-title: People Who P!$$ Us Off vs. Worst Jobs
programme.desc: It's unemployment lines and over the liners, as the world's worst jobs take on the people we love to hate. It's the battle of unpleasant work vs. unpleasant jerks. Games - Tumbling Dominoes of Doom, Wallbuggers, Elimination Idol & Surfboard of Death.

programme.title: MXC
programme.sub-title: Most Extreme Elimination Challenge - Top 25 Most Painful Eliminations of Season 2

programme.title: MXC
programme.sub-title: Meat Handlers vs. Cartoon Voice Actors
programme.desc:
The rivalry between the cartoon voice actors and America's meat handlers is finally settled. Plus, Vic gives Kenny advice on being a TV announcer.
Games include: Sinkers and Floaters; Log Drop; Wall Buggers; Boulder Dash

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc:
Those who take part in twelve step programs challenge those who gave a little bit of themselves in this edition of MXC, and the good captain talks about "tough love".
Games include: Mud Buttlers; Dash to Death; Rotating Surfboard of Death; Brass Balls; Pole Riders

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc: Dairy Workers vs. Automobile Workers (AKA Cows vs. Cars). Who will win out when its lactose versus lube jobs? Games: Wall Bangers, Get Hard!, Saddle Sores, Swish Bucklers, and the Teetering Temple of Crippling Doom.

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc:
The good guys challenge the bad guys in this battle. Also, Kenny dresses up as a cop with an attitude and Vic gets into the mind of a criminal.
Games include: Dope on a Rope; Prison Break; Hand Job; Bunk Buddies; Legal Maze; Yankin' It

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Quinn discovers her spiritual side and we all have to live through it.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: When Jake suffers a slight kitchen mishap of the inferno variety, the Morgendorffers must move to a hotel.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria helps Jane dye her hair with less than stellar results.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Lawndale High is low on funds and the students and Faculty need to start cutting corners.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Quinn reflects on anniversaries and her many admirers.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The fashion club sets new membership guidelines.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria and Quinn attend a camp reunion where a greased watermelon lies in wait.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The Fashion Club is inspired to do community service.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Baron Greenback and Count Duckula have teamed up in a quest to find the Great Bone Idol, which has the power to control every dog in the world. Greenback plans to use it to take over the world and Duckula would get Australia. This is besides the fact that Duckula has to do all the work. DM and Penfold head for the Himalaya's to stop the villainous duck.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Just when he's infiltrated Baron Greenbacks secret hideout, Dangermouse loses his memory after a crash on the head. GB takes advantage of the situation by making DM believe he is the second greatest criminal mastermind in the world, the White Shadow. In this new guise, DM immediately goes off on a relentless crime spree, stealing from the rich and giving to the poor.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: On his day of, Dangermouse decides to search for the long lost crown on Questzebottle (ancient King of the Aztecs and inventor of the practical joke) in the depths of the Amazonian Jungle. Baron Greenback decides to wait outside the temple and snatch the crown after DM has done all the difficult bits inside.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: A dragon has been terrorizing the countryside of Wales. Colonel K. sends Dangermouse and Penfold to investigate. Sure enough, they run into Jones the Dragon, who's small size belies his strength. Jones, for lack of a better 'damsel', kidnaps Penfold and takes him to his castle, a gift from his 'Frogfather', Baron Greenback.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback tests his new duplication machine on Penfold, which malfunctions and leaves him with hundreds of Penfolds to deal with.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Colonel K. just barely manages to inform Dangermouse and Penfold that Greenback has established himself on the moon and is trying to jam all communication. So, our heroes pack their weightless boots and jump into the Spacehopper to head for the moon.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.sub-title: The Next Ice Age Begins at Midnight
programme.desc: Greenback threatens to use his weather control machine to create an ice age if he is not crowned king of the world.

programme.title: Mr. Wizard's World
programme.sub-title: Electrocuted Hot Dog, Household Levers, Fly's Foot, Chocolate Journey, Watch, Mass vs Weight and more
programme.desc: Electrocuted Hot Dog, Household Levers, Fly's Feet, Magic Number, Oil Lamp, Chocolate Journey, Quartz Watch, Mass vs. Weight. Leila describes the various ways to cook a hot dog: boiling. fry, and baking in an oven. Mr. Wizard says they are going to electrocute one.
